title: OpenSourceHub
oneliner: A GitHub intelligence platform that scores repo health and surfaces hidden gems.
description: Built for developers who want to find quality open source projects fast. Features health scoring, beginner filters, trending detection, and a low-friction zero-auth browsing flow.
metric: 6-hour cache TTL / zero auth / edge functions

title: PromptVault
oneliner: An AI art gallery platform where artists publish work with full prompt details.
description: Designed for creators who want a clean way to archive prompts, compare generations, and share repeatable workflows without burying process notes in screenshots.

title: NightWave Studio
oneliner: A cinematic web identity system for anime-inspired digital brands.
description: Built for creative launches that need motion, mood, and clear conversion paths. The project explores fast-loading visual storytelling without hiding the core offer.
metric: Static deploy / responsive motion / brand system

title: AI Commander
oneliner: A prompt operations dashboard for creative automation workflows.
description: Built for artists and builders who need reusable prompt blocks, campaign notes, and a faster way to move from idea to generated visual direction.
metric: Reusable prompt blocks / workflow notes / fast search
